'''âm-n-n''' ('''kamanan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zoukify|zoukify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-n-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zoukify|zoukify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-n-n
|-
! Lemma
| kamanan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimanan|thimanan]] || [[word:jimanan|jimanan]] || [[word:shimanan|shimanan]] || [[word:kimanan|kimanan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumanan|thuthumanan]] || [[word:jujumanan|jujumanan]] || [[word:shushumanan|shushumanan]] || [[word:kukumanan|kukumanan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumanan|thumanan]] || [[word:jumanan|jumanan]] || [[word:shumanan|shumanan]] || [[word:kumanan|kumanan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumanan|thumanan]] || [[word:jumanan|jumanan]] || [[word:shumanan|shumanan]] || [[word:kumanan|kumanan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themanan|themanan]] || [[word:jemanan|jemanan]] || [[word:shemanan|shemanan]] || [[word:kemanan|kemanan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomanan|thothomanan]] || [[word:jojomanan|jojomanan]] || [[word:shoshomanan|shoshomanan]] || [[word:kokomanan|kokomanan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomanan|thomanan]] || [[word:jomanan|jomanan]] || [[word:shomanan|shomanan]] || [[word:komanan|komanan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomanan|thomanan]] || [[word:jomanan|jomanan]] || [[word:shomanan|shomanan]] || [[word:komanan|komanan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŚmanan|thĂŚmanan]] || [[word:jĂŚmanan|jĂŚmanan]] || [[word:shĂŚmanan|shĂŚmanan]] || [[word:kĂŚmanan|kĂŚmanan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamanan|thathamanan]] || [[word:jajamanan|jajamanan]] || [[word:shashamanan|shashamanan]] || [[word:kakamanan|kakamanan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamanan|thamanan]] || [[word:jamanan|jamanan]] || [[word:shamanan|shamanan]] || [[word:kamanan|kamanan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamanan|thamanan]] || [[word:jamanan|jamanan]] || [[word:shamanan|shamanan]] || [[word:kamanan|kamanan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shamanan|shamanan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshamanan|goshamanan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishamanan|gokishamanan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shamananĂź|shamananĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshamananknĂź|goshamananknĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishamananĂź|gokishamananĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shamananshĂŤ|shamananshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshamanankshĂŤ|goshamanankshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishamananshĂŤ|gokishamananshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamananro|shamananro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamanankro|goshamanankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamananro|gokishamananro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shamananmu|shamananmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamanankmu|goshamanankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamananmu|gokishamananmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shamanansher|shamanansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshamananksher|goshamananksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishamanansher|gokishamanansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shamanang|shamanang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshamanankng|goshamanankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishamanang|gokishamanang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shamananya|shamananya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshamanankya|goshamanankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishamananya|gokishamananya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shamananyam|shamananyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshamanankyam|goshamanankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishamananyam|gokishamananyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamananĂźshĂŤ|shamananĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamananknĂźshĂŤ|goshamananknĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamananĂźshĂŤ|gokishamananĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamananĂźro|shamananĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamananknĂźro|goshamananknĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamananĂźro|gokishamananĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamananĂźmu|shamananĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamananknĂźmu|goshamananknĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamananĂźmu|gokishamananĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamananshĂŤnĂź|shamananshĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamanankshĂŤnĂź|goshamanankshĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamananshĂŤnĂź|gokishamananshĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamananshĂŤro|shamananshĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamanankshĂŤro|goshamanankshĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamananshĂŤro|gokishamananshĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamananshĂŤmu|shamananshĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamanankshĂŤmu|goshamanankshĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamananshĂŤmu|gokishamananshĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamananronĂź|shamananronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamanankronĂź|goshamanankronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamananronĂź|gokishamananronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamananroshĂŤ|shamananroshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamanankroshĂŤ|goshamanankroshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamananroshĂŤ|gokishamananroshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamananromu|shamananromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamanankromu|goshamanankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamananromu|gokishamananromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamananmunĂź|shamananmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamanankmunĂź|goshamanankmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamananmunĂź|gokishamananmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamananmushĂŤ|shamananmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamanankmushĂŤ|goshamanankmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamananmushĂŤ|gokishamananmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamananmuro|shamananmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamanankmuro|goshamanankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamananmuro|gokishamananmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
